sender_identity: Molly Lindgren, on behalf of the Vidalia Garden Society

questions.prompt: How did you first hear about our tour

Was the sign at the entrance clear enough to know where to go
How were the volunteers who greeted you
Anything you would like us to do differently next year
Would you like to join the Vidalia Garden Society
If yes, what is a good phone number for Molly to call you

close_message: Thank you for walking our beds. Molly Lindgren and the Vidalia Garden Society
